resume_hint: Phase 147 diagnosis: dashboard /api/health stayed green while command-center-dashboard-api AppArmor denials accumulated for /proc/<pid>/stat and passive firewall/status sudo reads. aq-health-spider only checked /api/health every 7200s and auto-remediate only parsed aq-qa, so dashboard degradation was not caught promptly. Repo fixes: aq-health-spider now runs every 900s, probes /api/health/aggregate, /api/aistack/effectiveness/scorecard, /api/aistack/agent-runs?limit=1, and /api/traces/summary, removes success attention spam, and emits dashboard_degraded anomalies. auto-remediate runs health-spider --once before aq-qa and saves logs. firewall.py disables sudo for passive read endpoints by default. mcp-servers.nix includes /proc/@{pids}/stat AppArmor rule and explicit --interval 900. Validation performed: py_compile aq-health-spider/firewall.py; bash -n auto-remediate.sh; nix-instantiate --parse mcp-servers.nix; health-spider --once shows probes OK and existing AppArmor debt all paths covered. Need sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hyperd-ai-dev to activate.
